ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Rarity of the character (star rating) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character's gear */,
  "ready_for_mission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the character is ready for a mission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_gear_id FOREIGN KEY ("gear_id") REFERENCES gear ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the mission */,
  "recommended_level" INTEGER /* Recommended character level for the mission */,
  "required_gear_id" INTEGER /* Minimum gear level required for the mission */,
  "recommended_gear_id" INTEGER /* Recommended gear level for the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., PvP, PvE) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_type FOREIGN KEY ("mission_type") REFERENCES mission_type ("mission_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_recommended_gear_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_gear_id") REFERENCES gear ("gear_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_required_gear_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_gear_id") REFERENCES gear ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_mission" (
  "character_mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-mission pairing */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission was completed */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score achieved in the mission */,
  "completion_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the mission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-mission pairing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-mission pairing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_mission_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_mission_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gear" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gear */,
  "gear_name" TEXT /* Name of the gear */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of gear (e.g., sword, armor) */,
  "gear_level" INTEGER /* Level of the gear */,
  "gear_stats" TEXT /* Stats of the gear (e.g., damage, defense) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gear was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gear was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_gear" (
  "character_gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-gear pairing */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gear */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date when the gear was equipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-gear pairing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-gear pairing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_gear_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_gear_gear_id FOREIGN KEY ("gear_id") REFERENCES gear ("gear_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_gear_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_type" (
  "mission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission type */,
  "mission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate for the mission */,
  "average_completion_time" REAL /* Average completion time for the mission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
